reviews.comment:
Muy limpio todo, de las estaciones mas lindas y cuidadas que he visitado, los baños excelentes, un parque bien amplio como para que si venís de viaje con tu mascota pueda correr tranquila antes de seguir

(Translated by Google)
Everything is very clean, one of the most beautiful and well-maintained stations I have visited, the bathrooms are excellent, and the park is very large so that if you are traveling with your pet, it can run around in peace before continuing.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13657899365243523321/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURxMi1uWmRnEAE
